rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the further deposition of E.I. Du Pont De Nemours and Company¿s person most knowledgeable-custodian of records is off calendar at the request of the moving party. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: LLOYD KENDRICK et al VS. BORGWARNER, INC. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With Toyota Motor Sales, U.S.A., Inc.'S Document Request, And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Toyota Motor Sales, U.S.A., Inc.¿s motion to compel compliance with its document request and request for sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Defendant is awarded sanctions of $1210 (six hours at $195 per hour plu $40). = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: ALBERT LAWRENCE LEVENE VS. BONDEX INTERNATIONAL, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Volkswagen Group Of America, Inc.¿S And Volvo Cars Of North America, Llc¿S Motion To Compel Albert Levene To Produce Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Tuesday, June 28, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Volkswagen Group of America, Inc. and Volvo Cars of North America, LLC¿s motion to compel Albert Levene to produce documents is continued to August 2, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)
